    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AdminManager
    Class to manage the Admins within the Server this makes it so we can seperate admin and player profiles to prevent cheating, if it's just a little harder and a bit more public people are less likely to cheat
    AdminManager.AdminProfile
    Record of a sudo name, skin source, and signature

    BackpackManager
    a simple backpack system that stores contents in a persistent inventory.

    BackroomsManager
    Manages Backrooms specific features: protection and ambience.

    Base_Artifact

    BaseBlack
    Black Moveset
    BaseBlack.BlackInformation
    The BlackInformation class is used to store and manage information about specific player-related items and locations within the game.
    BaseBlack.BlackInformation.BlackMenu
    Represents a custom inventory implementation for managing "Black Locations".
    BaseBlock
     
    BaseBlock.Behavior
     
    BaseBlock.CollisionSize
     
    BaseBlue
    The BaseBlue class represents a derived implementation of the Base_Soul class providing specific functionality related to abilities, descriptions, and interactions for a particular type of resource or ability container.
    BaseCafe
    Older Blue Class, Reworked into "Cafe"

    FakePlayerHandle
    Wraps a genuine, network-less ServerPlayer so ordinary Bukkit plugins (anything listening for PlayerMoveEvent, EntityDamageEvent, etc.) cannot tell it apart from a real connected client.

    HashMapPersistentDataType
    A stateless PersistentDataType for storing and retrieving HashMap<String, Object>.
    HashMapPersistentDataType.LoadResult
    The deserialized map together with any metadata embedded at save time.
    HashMapPersistentDataType.SaveContext
    Optional metadata embedded alongside the map when saving.

    Illumina
     
    Information_Handler
     
    InventoryPersistentDataType
    A stateless PersistentDataType for storing and retrieving Inventory objects.
    InventoryPersistentDataType.LoadResult
    The deserialized inventory together with any metadata embedded at save time.
    InventoryPersistentDataType.SaveContext
    Metadata to embed when saving an inventory.
